name: Stord
description: Stord is a commerce fulfillment platform that combines physical warehouse infrastructure with integrated software to manage omnichannel logistics for DTC and B2B brands.

itemListElement.name: Stord One Commerce (OMS)
itemListElement.description: Order management system with 100+ integrations for omnichannel commerce

itemListElement.name: Stord One Warehouse (WMS)
itemListElement.description: Warehouse management system with real-time supply chain visibility

itemListElement.name: Stord API
itemListElement.description: REST API for managing orders, inventory, shipments, and returns

makesOffer.name: Fulfillment Network
makesOffer.description: 20+ fulfillment nodes across the US reaching nearly one-fourth of US households
